definitions: 恶化；变坏；退化（to become worse）

examples.text: Every single measure of material and environmental welfare in America, Europe, Asia, Africa and the world as a whole has improved rather than deteriorated.
examples.explanation: 句意：美国、欧洲、亚洲、非洲以及全世界的物质和环境福利指标都在改善，而不是恶化。deteriorated 在这里表示“变坏、恶化”。
